description: Monitor the remaining GitHub Copilot premium model quota directly from the VS Code status bar.
command.refresh.title: Refresh Quota
command.signIn.title: Sign In with GitHub
command.signOut.title: Sign Out
config.title: GitHub Copilot Premium Quota Monitor
config.refreshIntervalMinutes.descriptio: How often the quota data is automatically refreshed (1–60 minutes).
config.criticalThreshold.description: Quota percentage at or below which the status bar label turns the critical color (must be > 1 and < warning threshold).
config.criticalColor.description: Hex color used when quota is at or below the critical threshold (e.g. #FF0000).
config.warningThreshold.description: Quota percentage at or below which the status bar label turns the warning color (must be < 100 and > critical threshold).
config.warningColor.description: Hex color used when quota is at or below the warning threshold (e.g. #FFFF00).
